hello.description: A simple wave of the hand from left to right.

thankyou.description: Flat hand starting from chin moving forward and down.

yes.description: Fist moving up and down mimicking a nodding head.

no.description: Index and middle finger tapping down onto the thumb.

please.description: Flat hand rubbing the chest in a circular motion.

sorry.description: A-handshape (fist) rubbing the chest in a circular motion.

good.description: Flat hand moving from mouth down to meet the other hand.

bad.description: Flat hand moving from mouth down and flipping face-down.

help.description: Closed fist with thumbs-up resting on top of a flat open palm, lifted together.

eat.description: Closed handshape brought to the mouth repeatedly.

drink.description: C-handshape moving towards the mouth as if drinking from a cup.

sleep.description: Hand slides down the face, eyes closing as the hand descends.

love.description: Both hands crossed over the chest, fists closed.

friend.description: Interlocking index fingers, flipping and repeating.

home.description: O-handshape touching chin, then moving to touch the cheek near the ear.

school.description: Clapping flat hands together perpendicular to each other.

work.description: Tapping the wrist of the non-dominant hand with the fist of the dominant hand.

go.description: Index fingers pointing outward in a throwing motion.

come.description: Index fingers rolling inward towards the chest.

stop.description: Dominant flat hand chopping down onto the non-dominant open palm.

wait.description: Hands held out in front, palms up, fingers wiggling slightly.

now.description: Y-handshapes dropping downwards in front of the body.

later.description: L-handshape pivoting forward like a clock hand ticking.

today.description: Double downward drop of the Y-handshapes.

tomorrow.description: Thumb flicking forward from the jawline.

yesterday.description: Thumb touching jawline and moving backwards to touch the cheek near the ear.

man.description: Hand starting at forehead and moving down to rest on chest.

woman.description: Thumb starting at chin and moving down to rest on chest.

family.description: F-handshapes starting together, circling outward and meeting again.

water.description: W-handshape (three middle fingers extended) tapping the chin.
